stdoutTail:
Usage: danteforge [options] [command]

Agentic development CLI - structured specs, execution waves, multi-agent
orchestration

Options:
  -V, --version                        output the version number
  --quiet                              Suppress all output except errors
  --verbose                            Enable verbose/debug output
  -h, --help                           display help for command

Commands:
  init [options]                       Interactive first-run wizard â€” detect
                                       project, check health, show next steps
  plan [options] [goal]                Plan a goal or generate detailed plan
                                       from spec. Use --level to select scope.
  design [options] [prompt-or-action]  Design artifacts via OpenPencil. Pass
                                       natural language, or use actions: tokens
                                       | canvas | diff
  config [options]                     Manage API keys and LLM provider
                                       settings
  doctor [options]                     System health check and diagnostics
  help [options] [query]               Context-aware guidance â€” shows
                                       essential commands by default, --all for
                                       full list
  autoforge [options] [goal]           Deterministic auto-orchestration of the
                                       full DanteForge pipeline
  ship [options] [action]              Release guidance: verify â†’ QA â†’
                                       publish preflight pipeline (action:
                                       ci-setup)
  harvest [options] [goal]             Discover and learn from OSS patterns.
                                       --level selects depth: light=focused
                                       pattern, standard=bounded OSS pass,
                                       deep=OSS+local+universe refresh.
  compete [options]                    Benchmark against peers and close
                                       competitive gaps. --level selects depth:
                                       light=assess, standard=assess+universe,
                                       deep=full CHL loop.
  measure [options]                    Unified quality measurement â€” all
                                       scores in one consistent view. --level
                                       selects depth: light=fast metrics,
                                       standard=full dashboard (default),
                                       deep=+retro+nextStep.
  go|start [options] [goal]            Smart entry point: shows project state
                                       on existing projects, setup wizard on
                                       first run
  build [options] <spec>               Execute product work. --level selects
                                       depth: light=forge, standard=magic,
                                       deep=inferno. Without --level runs the
                                       full spec-to-ship wizard.
  evidence [options] [action]          Proof chains, Time Machine, causal
                                       attribution, evidence export
  knowledge [options] [action]         Lessons, synthesis, wiki, explain,
                                       pattern federation

The 12 canonical commands (each takes --level light|standard|deep where applicable):

  Start:    go          Smart entry point for any project state
            config      Configure LLM provider, MCP, skills, premium

  Build:    plan        Spec-to-tasks pipeline: specify â†’ clarify â†’ plan â†’ tasks
            build       Execute development waves (light=forge, standard=magic, deep=inferno)
            harvest     Learn from OSS patterns

  Quality:  measure     All quality scores in one consistent view (schema: measure.v1)
            compete     Competitive intelligence and gap analysis
            autoforge   Autonomous improvement loop

  Publish:  ship        Verify â†’ QA â†’ publish preflight (--dry-run safe)
            evidence    Proof chains, Time Machine, causal attribution

  Enhance:  knowledge   Lessons, synthesis, wiki, explain, pattern federation
            design      OpenPencil design-as-code, UX refinement, Figma push

Quick start:
  danteforge go              â€” new project wizard or status panel for existing
  danteforge measure         â€” see your project score (standard depth, consistent schema)
  danteforge measure --json  â€” machine-readable score for scripting/CI
  danteforge build           â€” one improvement wave
  danteforge autoforge --auto â€” autonomous loop to 9.0/10

Common flags:
  --level light|standard|deep   Select depth (default: standard)
  --json                         Machine-readable JSON output
  --prompt                       Generate copy-paste prompt (no API call)
  --worktree                     Isolated git worktree execution
  --verbose                      Debug output

Run "danteforge help" for the full command reference.
Run "danteforge init" to set up a new project.
